Story.title: Story
Story.description: A generated story with illustration and narration.

content.description: The full text content of the story.

theme.description: The theme or prompt used to generate the story.

imageUrl.description: Base64 encoded image data for the illustration.

audioUrl.description: Base64 encoded audio data for the narration.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the story was created.

isFavorite.description: Whether the story is marked as a favorite.

uid.description: The UID of the user who owns the story.

/stories/{storyId}.description: Collection of stories generated by users.
